response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine high-throughput distributed-systems experience (microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), a current Staff title, and hands-on AI-native work building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling, which matches the role's mindset baseline. However, Python — a must-have at 'strong' level — appears nowhere in his skills or work history, his highest-throughput work was in DLang and ended in 2020, and the resume shows little evidence of directing technical strategy, managing cross-functional stakeholders, or owning on-call/incident response at staff scope.
strengths: Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience: MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows in current role
Real high-throughput distributed-systems background: low-latency async services handling millions of HTTP requests/second
Strong TypeScript/Node depth, broad polyglot range, and a demonstrated testing/craftsmanship discipline with open-source ownership
concerns: No Python anywhere on the resume, which is a must-have 'strong' skill for the role
Little demonstrated evidence of staff-scope technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder management, or formal on-call/incident-response ownership
Deepest high-throughput experience is in DLang and dates to 2018–2020; recent work skews full-stack product engineering
